title: Automation Location and World Clock Columns
excerpt:
Aloha, 
Is it possible to create an app that would use a location column to auto-populate a world clock column?That way if you set the location as Los Angeles, CA, the world clock would automatically convert to PST/PDT?

posts.author: cfraticelli (Celene Fraticelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Aloha,

Is it possible to create an app that would use a location column to auto-populate a world clock column?That way if you set the location as Los Angeles, CA, the world clock would automatically convert to PST/PDT?

posts.author: rbabayoff (Ronen Babayoff @ Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Aloha to you too, yes easily, with an integration receipt. Contact me privately if you want to get this going.

Cheers,
Ronen

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @cfraticelli

That’s an awesome use case! I definitely see how that would help save some time for your team.

This definitely sounds like it could be set up on your end, like @rbabayoff suggests Let us know if you got it to work!

-Alex
